activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the duration error.
activities.prompt: We've lived here since five years.

evaluator.answer: We've lived here for five years

activities.explanation: «Five years» es un periodo y se introduce con «for».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the duration error.
activities.prompt: Mina has worked here for 2022.

evaluator.answer: Mina has worked here since 2022

activities.explanation: Un año concreto marca el inicio y va con «since».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the present perfect error.
activities.prompt: I have knew Jo for a long time.

evaluator.answer: I have known Jo for a long time

activities.explanation: Después de «have» necesitamos el participio «known».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete question, correcting the duration error.
activities.prompt: How long do you have this bicycle?

evaluator.answer: How long have you had this bicycle

activities.explanation: La posesión que continúa se pregunta con «How long have you had ...?».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the present perfect error.
activities.prompt: The café has be closed since Monday.

evaluator.answer: The café has been closed since Monday

activities.explanation: Después de «has» necesitamos el participio «been».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the duration error.
activities.prompt: We haven't used the room since several weeks.

evaluator.answer: We haven't used the room for several weeks

activities.explanation: «Several weeks» es una duración y exige «for».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the starting-point error.
activities.prompt: I've worked from home for the renovations began.

evaluator.answer: I've worked from home since the renovations began

activities.explanation: La cláusula que marca el inicio debe ir precedida de «since».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the tense after «since».
activities.prompt: I've used this route since I have moved to the area.

evaluator.answer: I've used this route since I moved to the area

activities.explanation: El traslado inicial es un acontecimiento terminado y usa past simple.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete question, correcting the word order.
activities.prompt: How long has worked Amir in customer support?

evaluator.answer: How long has Amir worked in customer support

activities.explanation: El auxiliar precede al sujeto: «has Amir worked».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the irregular participle.
activities.prompt: Leila has teached at this school for ten years.

evaluator.answer: Leila has taught at this school for ten years

activities.explanation: El participio irregular de «teach» es «taught».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, showing that the situation continues now.
activities.prompt: I lived in this area for six years, and I still live here.

evaluator.answer: I have lived in this area for six years, and I still live here

activities.explanation: Como la residencia continúa, corresponde present perfect: «have lived».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, showing that the situation ended.
activities.prompt: We have lived in Bristol for eight years, but we moved away in 2020.

evaluator.answer: We lived in Bristol for eight years, but we moved away in 2020

activities.explanation: El traslado cerró el periodo de residencia, así que usamos past simple.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the time-elapsed structure.
activities.prompt: It's been three months for I last drove.

evaluator.answer: It's been three months since I last drove

activities.explanation: La estructura requiere «since» antes del acontecimiento inicial.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the stative verb error.
activities.prompt: Nora has been knowing Omar since primary school.

evaluator.answer: Nora has known Omar since primary school

activities.explanation: «Know» es un verbo de estado y usa present perfect simple.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the duration preposition.
activities.prompt: The subscription has been active during three years.

evaluator.answer: The subscription has been active for three years

activities.explanation: Para medir cuánto dura el estado usamos «for», no «during».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the starting-point preposition.
activities.prompt: The alarm hasn't worked properly for the power cut.

evaluator.answer: The alarm hasn't worked properly since the power cut

activities.explanation: El corte de luz es el acontecimiento inicial y se introduce con «since».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting subject–auxiliary agreement.
activities.prompt: Neither lift have been available for two days.

evaluator.answer: Neither lift has been available for two days

activities.explanation: «Neither lift» funciona como sujeto singular y exige «has».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the tense after «since».
activities.prompt: The river has been cleaner since the factory has installed new filters.

evaluator.answer: The river has been cleaner since the factory installed new filters

activities.explanation: La instalación es un acontecimiento inicial terminado y usa past simple.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the duration preposition.
activities.prompt: This cottage has belonged to the same family since four generations.

evaluator.answer: This cottage has belonged to the same family for four generations

activities.explanation: «Four generations» es un periodo y se introduce con «for».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the passive form.
activities.prompt: The guidance document hasn't updated since the service launched.

evaluator.answer: The guidance document hasn't been updated since the service launched

activities.explanation: La pasiva negativa necesita «hasn't been updated».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the tense after «since».
activities.prompt: Ravi has known Elena since they have met at a training course.

evaluator.answer: Ravi has known Elena since they met at a training course

activities.explanation: El encuentro es el acontecimiento inicial terminado y usa «met».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the link to the starting event.
activities.prompt: We've had this policy for we moved into the building.

evaluator.answer: We've had this policy since we moved into the building

activities.explanation: Una cláusula que señala el comienzo se introduce con «since».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting subject–auxiliary agreement.
activities.prompt: Neither payment option have been available for forty-eight hours.

evaluator.answer: Neither payment option has been available for forty-eight hours

activities.explanation: «Neither payment option» es singular y requiere «has been».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the time-elapsed structure.
activities.prompt: It has been eight months for it last rained here.

evaluator.answer: It has been eight months since it last rained here

activities.explanation: Después del periodo usamos «since» para introducir el último acontecimiento.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the tense after «since».
activities.prompt: The family has operated this bakery since the founder has opened it in 1998.

evaluator.answer: The family has operated this bakery since the founder opened it in 1998

activities.explanation: La apertura es un hecho inicial terminado y usa past simple.
